samples.text: A person reads a book in complete darkness with no light. Is this expected based on common sense?
Someone reads a book in total darkness without any light. Does this match everyday common sense?
An individual reads a novel in pitch darkness with no illumination. Is this expected based on common sense?
Reading needs light to see text. In complete darkness one cannot read. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A person reads a book in complete darkness with no light. This topic was discussed last week. Is this expected based on common sense?
